productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Tango Brown Sandals
description: Stylish and uber cool, these leather flip flops from the united colors of benetton will add an extra bounce to your steps. With a high quality leather upper and a cushioned footbed, they are ideal for all-day wear. If you want to look awesome and feel great, they are your best bet. Team them with jeans or chinos for a perfectly relaxed look. It was never easier to look spectacular, classy and wow! Upper Full grain leather straps in thong style for durability and style Thread detailing for added structure and style Fabric toe separator for maximum comfort and durability Elevated structures on the forefoot for an ergonomic Fit Midsole EVA midsole for long-term durability and protection of feet against impact Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Fabric lining for increased comfort Branding on footbed Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Mesh like pattern all over the outsole for better grip on all surfaces shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
